title: condition-generic plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the condition-generic semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_COMMAND.description: Optional newline-separated shell commands to run. All commands must succeed for the condition to pass.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ENV_VAR.description: Optional environment variable name to check.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_ENV_VALUE.description: Expected value for SEMREL_PLUGIN_ENV_VAR. Leave empty to require only presence.
